title: Activate the count of subitem in boards
excerpt:
Even if you have the option on board to count the subitem they are currently not added to the total of the board 
if subitems can be added and counted in the dashboard views it will be easier and provide us corrects boar…

posts.author: Dilou (Odile)
posts.cookedHtml:
Even if you have the option on board to count the subitem they are currently not added to the total of the board
if subitems can be added and counted in the dashboard views it will be easier and provide us corrects boards
